headline: Barclays Raises Price Target on Amphenol Corporation (APH)
summary: Amphenol Corporation (NYSE:APH) is among the 10 Best Fundamentally Strong Stocks to Buy for Long Term. On June 8, Barclays bumped up its price target on Amphenol Corporation (NYSE:APH) to $198 from $180. The firm maintained an “Overweight” rating on the shares. Barclays said it raised its estimates after gaining more confidence in the company’s […]
